headline: TE Connectivity exceeds 2025 corporate responsibility goals
summary: Five years following the launch of its One Connected World corporate responsibility strategy, TE Connectivity, a world leader in connectors and sensors, has exceeded several of its goals to be more sustainable, safer and more inclusive.

raw.headline: TE Connectivity exceeds 2025 corporate responsibility goals
raw.summary: Five years following the launch of its One Connected World corporate responsibility strategy, TE Connectivity, a world leader in connectors and sensors, has exceeded several of its goals to be more sustainable, safer and more inclusive.

headline: TE Connectivity Beats 2025 80% Renewable Energy Source Goals by 7%
summary: Since launching the strategy, combined efforts of TE employees around the world have allowed the company to:Reduce the amount of hazardous waste disposed by 66% (beyond a goal of 15%)Reduce the amount of water withdrawn
